mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_report_ticket ( ticket_no, product_id, reporter_id, report_type, description, evidence_urls, status, resolver_id, resolve_action, resolve_remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{ticketNo}, #{productId}, #{reporterId}, #{reportType}, #{description}, #{evidenceUrls}, #{status}, #{resolverId}, #{resolveAction}, #{resolveRemark}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, ticket_no AS ticketNo, product_id AS productId, reporter_id AS reporterId, report_type AS reportType, description, evidence_urls AS evidenceUrls, status, resolver_id AS resolverId, resolve_action AS resolveAction, resolve_remark AS resolveRemark, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM product_report_ticket WHERE ticket_no = #{ticketNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, ticket_no AS ticketNo, product_id AS productId, reporter_id AS reporterId, report_type AS reportType, description, evidence_urls AS evidenceUrls, status, resolver_id AS resolverId, resolve_action AS resolveAction, resolve_remark AS resolveRemark, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM product_report_ticket ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE product_report_ticket SET status = #{targetStatus}, resolver_id = #{resolverId}, resolve_action = #{resolveAction}, resolve_remark = #{resolveRemark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE ticket_no = #{ticketNo} AND status = 'PENDING'
